name: Stickman Fighter: Epic Battle
description: You like fighting games and stickman games? Then this game was made for you! Enter the arena and play as a heroic Stickman. You must fight against your opponents. You must have no mercy against them. To win, you have to kill them all. But watch out because you'll face numerous warriors.
instructions: Click touch on the right or the left of the screen or use arrow keys to hit Beat the enemies Stand in front of your opponents and start the combat Each enemy is unique A life bar shows your health
tags: Action, Battle, Fight, Game, Highscore, Skill, Stickman, Sword, weapons
